actual_title: Backtracking, Branch and Bound, and Exhaustive Search

cards.title: Search Space Definition
cards.governance_note: Document candidate generation, exclusions, state representation, and completion boundaries.

cards.title: Pruning and Bounds
cards.governance_note: Preserve pruning rules, bound derivations, incumbent history, and proof or validation of soundness.

cards.title: Stopping and Traceability
cards.governance_note: Report whether the search was complete, bounded, timed out, heuristic, or approximate, with branch logs and candidate counts.
